creator: effingerjordan@gmail.com
text: The use case of the program is to create a variable number of files with similar names, but unpredicatble suffixes that can be used to create a file as a temporary information storage, or to be used when needed within a shell script. Version 1.0 is consciously minimal and meant to be simple, useful and secure, with more version's intended with more control capabilities for fine-tuning.
